description: Tracks continuation relationships between patent applications, including divisional, continuation, and continuation-in-part applications.

columns.name: parent_appln_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the parent patent application.

columns.name: appln_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the child/continuing patent application.

columns.name: contn_type
columns.description: Type of continuation relationship (e.g., divisional, continuation, continuation-in-part).
